docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,606.25 FILED BY BRATTESANI,STEVEN J. DR. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS,WILLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO APR-08-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF FEB-24-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE REQUEST TO MAY 05-94 AT 8:00AM RESERVED(MANUALLY FIRST)-PER STAN THEN RESERVED-SYSTEM UP,SENT TO DEPT 6 AT 9:30AM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS,WILLIE
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST F/CONTINUANCE DENIED BY JUDGE. UNTIMELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-22-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATTESANI,STEVEN J. DR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS,WILLIE $955.01 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUN-30-1994, GRANTED
JUDGMENT TO BE PAID AS FOLLOWS: $600 BY 7/1/94 BALANCE BY 8/1/94. IF NOT COMPLIED WITH ORIGINAL JUDGMENT REINSTATED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS,WILLIE
